events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes multiple hazards on a commercial construction site: cords across walkways, missing guardrails, blocked egress/extinguishers, improvised scaffolds, unattended open holes. Work is in-progress. Need to identify hazards, severity, controls. Decision should be fail due to dangerous/non-compliant conditions. Risk critical. Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective.

    "Unattended open holes without covers or guardrails"

  "actions": [
    "Relocate or elevate cords using cord covers or overhead routing",
    "Install standard guardrails or fall protection immediately at open edges",
    "Clear egress paths of all obstructions",
    "Ensure fire extinguishers are unobstructed and accessible",
    "Remove improvised scaffold; erect scaffold per Subpart L with competent person supervision",
    "Cover open holes with secured covers or install guardrails; flag/barricade area"
  ],
  "rationale": "Multiple serious hazards are present during active work, including fall hazards, trip hazards, blocked egress, and non-compliant scaffolding. These conditions violate OSHA general duty and 1926 Subpart L requirements, requiring immediate corrective action before work continues.",
